regulations.name: Virginia Clean Economy Act (VCEA)
regulations.summary: Requires Virginia utilities to achieve 100% carbon-free electricity by 2045.
regulations.relevance: Affects energy sourcing for cooling system power consumption

regulations.name: Clean Air Act (Federal)
regulations.summary: Regulates air emissions from stationary sources. Backup generators require permits.
regulations.relevance: Backup cooling systems with diesel generators require EPA permits
